frozen_rules.abstention_threshold: Use threshold policy external_hard_negative_threshold_policy_v1_2026_05_17 at floor 0.4115 unless a separately justified global calibration creates a new threshold policy version.
admissible_source_evidence: explicit active-site or catalytic residue evidence
specific catalytic activity or reaction evidence
coordinate mapping for the scored local active-site features
duplicate_rules: reject near-duplicate sequence evidence at the active threshold
screen external candidates all-vs-all before terminal import
structural_neighborhood_rules: native M-CSA strict TM-diverse holdout claims stay disabled
strict TM-diverse evaluation belongs on external fold-diverse structural data
structure clusters must be assigned before split construction
success_criteria: all current fingerprint scores are below 0.4115
terminal review accepts out-of-scope only for label_factory_v1_8fp
full label-factory and external-transfer gates pass
failure_criteria: any current fingerprint score reaches or exceeds 0.4115
duplicate or structural-neighborhood controls flag a current-countable neighbor
source evidence is review-only or incomplete
review-only context is required for scoring
ontology version or threshold policy is unrecorded

warnings: This artifact freezes the next external hard-negative tranche before candidate selection; it does not import labels.
External out_of_scope labels remain scoped to ontology_version_at_decision and must be re-audited after positive fingerprint expansion.
